Document 2: Directs the Department of Health and Human Services to promulgate a final rule revising federal regulations regarding the importation of nonhuman primates.
Establish a process for the certification of facilities as primate sanctuaries for purposes of the importation, shelter, and care of nonhuman primates.

topic.name: U.S. Transportation Security Legislation
topic.description: Legislation aimed at enhancing security measures for various modes of transportation, including air cargo and maritime operations.

Document 1: Directs the Inspector General of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to conduct a study of gaps in U.S. port security
help expedite the clearance process if a designated point of contact does not have the necessary security clearance
Document 2: Directs the Secretary of Homeland Security (DHS) to establish a system for the screening and inspecting of all cargo transported in domestic and foreign all-cargo aircraft

Requires such systems to meet minimum standards that ensure equipment, technology, procedures, or personnel used for screening cargo provide a level of security commensurate with the security level for screening passenger checked baggage
Document 3: Shields an owner, operator, time charterer, master, or mariner who uses, or authorizes the use of, force to defend a vessel of the United States against piracy from liability

Directs the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating to work through the International Maritime Organization (IMO) to establish agreements to promote coordinated action among flag- and port-states to deter, protect against, and rapidly respond to acts of piracy

topic.name: Marine and Water Resource Management
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislative measures aimed at the conservation, sustainability, and management of marine and water resources in the United States.

1: Amends the Northwest Straits Marine Conservation Initiative Act to define 'Northwest Straits' as the marine waters of the Strait of Juan de Fuca and of Puget Sound.
States the goal of the Commission as the protection and restoration of the marine waters, habitats, and species of the Northwest Straits region.
2: Requires the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to establish the Water Infrastructure Resiliency and Sustainability Program to provide grants to owners or operators of water systems.
Promote more efficient water use, water conservation, water reuse, or recycling.

topic.name: Federal Agency Operations and Regulations
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation aimed at improving the efficiency and regulatory framework of federal agencies.

Document 1: Allows federal agencies to retain up to 25% of annual savings from the implementation of plans developed by such agencies
Requires an agency to submit to the appropriate congressional committees a plan and an associated request to amend its approved operating budget
Document 2: Amends the Public Health Service Act to add as requirements for appointment as Surgeon General that an individual be a licensed physician
Requires the Surgeon General to submit to the President an annual budget estimate for the Office of the Surgeon General
Document 3: Requires each federal and state court to recognize any lawful notarization occurring in or affecting interstate commerce
Requires such a notarization to use a seal of office as symbol of the notary public's authority

topic.name: Legislative Reforms in Social Policy
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislative measures aimed at reforming social policies related to agriculture, education, and public safety.

Document 1: amends the Agricultural Act of 2014
eliminates the existing exemption for family farms
Document 2: Amends the school improvement program under part A of title I
requires state school improvement plans to contain assurances
Document 3: Requires sex offenders who are U.S. citizens or permanent residents to notify appropriate jurisdictions
imposes a fine and/or prison term of up to 10 years for failure to report

topic.name: Education and Environmental Policy
topic.description: This cluster addresses legislative measures aimed at improving financial education and promoting environmental sustainability through government actions.

Document 1: Authorizes federal agencies to purchase greenhouse gas offsets and renewable energy credits.
Defines 'greenhouse gas offsets' to mean a reduction in GHG emissions.
Document 2: Amends the Higher Education Act to provide detailed information on repayment options for federal student loan borrowers.
Requires annual verification of borrower's income and outstanding loan balance.
Document 3: Directs the Secretary of Education to award grants for financial education programs in high schools.
Establishes a central clearinghouse of information on high school financial education programs.

topic.name: Federal Funding and Policy Management
topic.description: This topic encompasses the management and allocation of federal funds for education and infrastructure projects, along with the policies governing their use.

Document 1: federal elementary and secondary education funds on a consolidated basis
use fiscal control and fund accounting procedures
Document 2: comprehensive review of the Corps of Engineers policy guidelines on vegetation management
recommend to the Chief of Engineers vegetation management policies for levees

Document 3: authorize the Secretary of the Interior to pay the amount owed to the subcontractors
the primary contract between PGI and the National Park Service is terminated
